name: Trinidad State College Arts and Culture Events Calendar
public_facing_note: Submit arts and culture events for consideration on the Trinidad State College calendar.
best_for: Arts events, lectures, exhibits, performances, public/community partner events
notes: Page explicitly welcomes on-campus and off-campus arts/culture event submissions from community partners or public organizations.

name: Downtown Walsenburg Event Calendar
public_facing_note: Submit City of Walsenburg events to the downtown calendar when they are within the city boundary.
best_for: Downtown sales, yard sales, live music, gallery openings, Porchfest-related events
notes: Page says approved events are limited to the City of Walsenburg and points other regional events to Spanish Peaks Country.

name: Bachman and Associates Weekly Community Calendar
county_scope: Huerfano County / La Veta / Cuchara / Gardner / Walsenburg
public_facing_note: Email event details for possible inclusion in the local weekly event calendar.
best_for: Farmers markets, La Veta/Cuchara/Gardner/Walsenburg community events, recurring local happenings
notes: Page says to email event information by Friday at noon and notes the website calendar updates monthly while the email list is weekly.

name: LiveTaos Event Calendar
county_scope: Northern New Mexico / Taos spillover / Angel Fire and nearby Colfax fit
public_facing_note: Submit northern New Mexico arts, music, classes, and community events; accepted items also appear on Taos.org.
best_for: Angel Fire, Eagle Nest, Cimarron, Raton, or northern NM events with Taos/Enchanted Circle audience fit
notes: LiveTaos says approved events also appear on the Daily Events Calendar on Taos.org.

name: Taos.org Daily Events Calendar
public_facing_note: Use as downstream visibility when a LiveTaos submission is accepted.
best_for: Northern New Mexico visitor-facing arts, music, classes, cultural events, and community celebrations
notes: Taos.org itself describes the daily calendar; LiveTaos states accepted submissions appear there.

name: KCRT / KBKZ Radio
county_scope: Las Animas County / Trinidad plus Raton and Walsenburg signal area
public_facing_note: Contact KCRT/KBKZ for radio announcement, interview, or community visibility possibilities; verify current rates and public-service policies.
best_for: Trinidad, Raton, Walsenburg, southern Colorado and northern New Mexico events
notes: Site lists KCRT/KBKZ contact info including kcrt@comcast.net and phone numbers; no open calendar form found.

name: KTLF Radio Network Community Calendar
public_facing_note: Submit family-friendly community events for possible calendar sharing with a Colorado Springs-based Christian radio audience.
best_for: Church events, fundraisers, family events, community concerts, conferences
notes: Broader southern Colorado reach; use only when audience fit makes sense.

name: La Veta Public Library Full Calendar
public_facing_note: Use for La Veta library-hosted programs and partner events; contact the library before assuming outside events can be listed.
best_for: Library programs, town meetings, farmers market, local educational events
notes: Calendar is active; public third-party submission route not found in this sweep.

name: Spanish Peaks Library District Events
public_facing_note: Use for library-hosted or library-partnered events in Walsenburg and Huerfano County.
best_for: Library programs, book sales, public learning events, youth/family events
notes: Calendar is active; public submission route not found in this sweep.

name: Trinidad Carnegie Public Library Events
public_facing_note: Use for library-hosted events and community programs; call or email before treating it as a general listing channel.
best_for: Library programs, youth/family events, community learning, local arts and history programs
notes: Calendar and contact are public; general event submission path not found.

name: Trinidad Carnegie Public Library Community Art Wall
public_facing_note: Artists can contact the library about displaying two-dimensional artwork on community art walls.
best_for: Visual artists, student artists, local exhibits, low-cost display opportunities
notes: Older page, but it gives a clear contact action; verify current availability before publishing as active.

name: Raton MainStreet Events
public_facing_note: Use for downtown Raton signature events and MainStreet-linked visibility; verify submission or partnership route with Raton MainStreet.
best_for: Downtown festivals, First Street events, volunteer calls, vendor opportunities
notes: Calendar exists and lists events; open event submission path not found.

name: Gate City Music Festival Vendor Route
public_facing_note: Use when a vendor, food business, artisan, or service provider wants to participate in the Gate City Music Festival.
best_for: Vendors, artists, food/service businesses, festival booth outreach
notes: Site lists vendor information and 2026 vendor application routes.

name: Raton Arts and Humanities Council / Old Pass Gallery
public_facing_note: Use for visual arts calendar, gallery programming, and local arts visibility in Raton.
best_for: Artists, gallery shows, openings, arts education, Raton creative events
notes: Site shows a visual arts calendar image and gallery role; submission process needs direct confirmation.

name: Main Street LIVE
public_facing_note: Use for events hosted, rented, or programmed through Main Street LIVE; not a general event listing channel.
best_for: Theatre, comedy, music, community performances, venue rental, auditions
notes: Site provides full calendar, venue rental, and contact info.

name: A.R. Mitchell Museum of Western Art
public_facing_note: Use for art openings, museum-hosted events, lectures, and possible venue-hosted arts events.
best_for: Arts events, gallery openings, lectures, nonprofit event hosting
notes: Event calendar and event hosting pages are public; posting applies to museum/hosted events, not general listings.

name: La Veta Creative District
public_facing_note: Use for La Veta arts, festivals, performing arts, and creative-district visibility.
best_for: Arts festivals, performing arts, gallery events, creative-district partner events
notes: Site lists festivals/signature events and contact info; open submission path not found.

name: Francisco Center for the Performing Arts
public_facing_note: Book or coordinate theatre events through the FCPA route.
best_for: Performances, community theatre, music, lectures, nonprofit events
notes: Page gives booking instructions and theater@fcpalaveta.org.

name: La Veta Mercantile Events
public_facing_note: Use for events hosted at La Veta Mercantile and for cross-promotion around booked shows.
best_for: Concerts, talks, ticketed events, local music, visiting performers
notes: Active ticketing calendar; submission/booking path should be confirmed directly.

name: Fox Theatre Walsenburg
public_facing_note: Use for arts and cultural activities hosted by Fox Theatre Walsenburg; verify booking or promotional route directly.
best_for: Film, theatre, arts, cultural activities, nonprofit or community programming
notes: Colorado.com listing gives contact details; open event submission path not found.

name: Cuchara Mountain Park Event Calendar
public_facing_note: Use for events hosted at Cuchara Mountain Park or partner outdoor recreation events.
best_for: Outdoor recreation, fundraisers, races, family activities, nonprofit events
notes: Calendar exists; submission route needs direct confirmation.

name: Francisco Fort Museum Events Calendar
public_facing_note: Use for museum-hosted and partner heritage events in La Veta.
best_for: History, heritage, museum events, family cultural programs, local festivals
notes: Calendar exists; public open submission route not found.

name: Southern Colorado Tourism Events
county_scope: Southern Colorado / Las Animas and Huerfano overlap
public_facing_note: Use as a broader southern Colorado visibility lead for events with regional visitor appeal.
best_for: Trinidad, Walsenburg, La Veta, heritage, arts, outdoor, and festival events
notes: Events page exists; public submission path not found.

name: Share Pueblo Events
public_facing_note: Use for events that could draw Pueblo-area audiences, especially Walsenburg/Huerfano and I-25 corridor events.
best_for: Regional festivals, concerts, community gatherings, events with Pueblo audience fit
notes: Site says email for assistance adding or updating events; verify geographic fit before recommending.

name: City of Pueblo Submit Your Event
public_facing_note: Use only for events that make sense for Pueblo-area audiences or are connected to Pueblo partners.
best_for: Large regional events, festivals, public events drawing Pueblo attendees
notes: Broader regional reach, not tri-county-specific.

name: Colorado Springs Gazette Events Listings
public_facing_note: Use selectively for nonprofit, arts, military, literary, outdoor, or regional events that fit Colorado Springs-area listings.
best_for: Nonprofit fundraisers, arts events, outdoor events, regional cultural happenings
notes: Gazette notes some listings appear space-available and at editorial discretion.

name: ColoradoSprings.com Calendar
public_facing_note: Use for events with Pikes Peak or southern Colorado audience fit, not routine hyperlocal tri-county items.
best_for: Major festivals, performances, outdoor recreation, ticketed regional events
notes: Calendar has an Add Your Event affordance; verify suitability before broad public recommendation.

name: Do303
public_facing_note: Use for music, nightlife, arts, or unusual events with enough pull for a Front Range audience.
best_for: Music, nightlife, festivals, ticketed arts/culture events
notes: Broader Colorado platform; only use when the event reasonably belongs there.

name: Bandsintown for Artists
public_facing_note: Artists can add live music events so followers and concert-discovery tools can find the show.
best_for: Bands, solo musicians, touring performers, concerts, venue shows
notes: Best for artist-led concert discovery; requires artist/dashboard access.

name: Songkick
public_facing_note: Add concerts for artists or venues so fans tracking artists can discover local shows.
best_for: Bands, venues, touring acts, concerts, music festivals
notes: Useful for live music visibility beyond local calendars.

name: Resident Advisor
public_facing_note: Submit electronic music and nightlife events for approval.
best_for: DJ events, electronic music, dance nights, club-style events
notes: Niche use; include only for genre-fit events.
